definition.procedurexml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><variables><variable type="Entity" id="player">player</variable></variables><block type="event_trigger" deletable="false" x="40" y="40"><field name="trigger">no_ext_trigger</field><next><block type="variables_set_entity"><mutation xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml" is_player_var="false" has_entity="false"></mutation><field name="VAR">local:player</field><value name="VAL"><block type="procedure_retval_entity"><mutation xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml" inputs="1"></mutation><field name="procedure">SpawnFakePlayer</field><field name="name0">name</field><value name="arg0"><block type="text"><field name="TEXT">null</field></block></value></block></value><next><block type="java_code"><field name="CODE">player.moveTo(Vec3.atBottomCenterOf(BlockPos.containing(x, y, z)));;</field><next><block type="move_entity"><value name="entity"><block type="variables_get_entity"><mutation xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml" is_player_var="false" has_entity="false"></mutation><field name="VAR">local:player</field></block></value><value name="x"><block type="coord_x"></block></value><value name="y"><block type="coord_y"></block></value><value name="z"><block type="coord_z"></block></value><next><block type="return_entity"><value name="return"><block type="procedure_retval_entity"><mutation xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml" inputs="1"></mutation><field name="procedure">NearbyPlayer</field><field name="name0">entity</field><value name="arg0"><block type="variables_get_entity"><mutation xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml" is_player_var="false" has_entity="false"></mutation><field name="VAR">local:player</field></block></value></block></value></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></xml>
